title: phleum cristatum
intro: Phleum cristatum, also known as Crested Meadow-grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Phleum cristatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Phleum cristatum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
